title: Schlechteranthus steenbokensis
taxonomy: Schlechteranthus steenbokensis is a species of flowering plant in the family Aizoaceae. It is endemic to Namibia, a country in southern Africa. The plant belongs to the genus Schlechteranthus, which is characterized by its succulent leaves and stems. Within the genus, Schlechteranthus steenbokensis is classified as a distinct species due to its unique characteristics and morphology. The classification of Schlechteranthus steenbokensis is a subject of study in the field of botany.
